name: labs_sensors_metrics_limits
query:
SELECT
        m.sensor_id,
        assets.asset_id,
        s.type,
        assets.name AS asset_name,
        MAX(a.warning) AS warning,
        MAX(a.critical) AS critical,
        MAX(m.value) >= MAX(a.warning) AS alert,
        MAX(m.value) >= MAX(a.critical) AS critical_alert,  
        MAX(m.value) + ABS(MAX(m.value) * 0.1) AS critical_value,
        MIN(m.timestamp) AT TIME ZONE 'utc' AS lowest_timestamp
    FROM labs_alerts a
    INNER JOIN labs_metrics m ON a.sensor_id = m.sensor_id
    JOIN labs_sensors s ON s.sensor_id = m.sensor_id
    LEFT JOIN labs_assets assets ON assets.asset_id = s.asset_id 
    GROUP BY 1,2,3,4
